subcodes.first_line: O faithful servant of the Ancient Beauty! Thy letter, like unto the Garden of Paradise, was read and beheld, for every page therein [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده صادق جمال قدم رقیم چون باغ نعیم قرائت و تماشا شد زیرا هر ورقی که دفتر
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @praise and encouragement
